thresholdSource: Endocrine marker; thyroid storm is diagnosed clinically, not by a specific total T3 cutoff — no citable acute critical value. plausibleHigh 400: above a documented survivor with total T3 358 ng/dL (ref 97-169 ng/dL) during thyroid-storm-related multiorgan failure treated with plasmapheresis, discharged home three weeks later (PMC6811794). Accuracy bound only. Draft — not clinician-approved.
